---
title: "Wine Quality EDA"
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
      pdf-engine: pdflatex
      papersize: a4
      fontsize: 11pt
jupyter: shapley-guided-vae
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: true
---

```{python}
import os
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Latex, display

OUTPUT_DIR = Path("../analysis/output")


def is_pdf():
  return os.environ.get("QUARTO_FORMAT", "").startswith("pdf")


def read_indexed_csv(name):
    return pd.read_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / name, index_col=0)


def read_plain_csv(name):
    return pd.read_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / name)


def show_table(df, caption, indexed=True):
  if is_pdf():
    column_format = "l" + "r" * len(df.columns) if indexed else "r" * len(df.columns)
    tabular = df.to_latex(index=indexed, escape=False, column_format=column_format)
    latex = "\n".join(
      [
        "\\begin{table}[!htbp]",
        "\\centering",
        "\\scriptsize",
        f"\\caption{{{caption}}}",
        "\\resizebox{\\textwidth}{!}{%",
        tabular,
        "}",
        "\\end{table}",
      ]
    )
    display(Latex(latex))
  else:
    display(df)


def show_summary_tables(name):
  df = read_indexed_csv(f"{name}_summary.csv")
  core = df[["count", "mean", "std", "variance"]]
  shape = df[["min", "q1", "median", "q3", "max", "skewness", "kurtosis"]]
  show_table(core, f"{name.title()} wine summary statistics: central tendency and spread")
  show_table(shape, f"{name.title()} wine summary statistics: range, quantiles, and shape")
```

## Red Wine

### Summary Table

```{python}
show_summary_tables("red")
```

### Distribution Plots

![Red wine distributions for all 11 variables](../analysis/output/figures/red_distributions.png)

### Pearson Correlation

![Red wine Pearson correlation matrix](../analysis/output/figures/red_pearson_correlation.png)

### Spearman Correlation

![Red wine Spearman correlation matrix](../analysis/output/figures/red_spearman_correlation.png)

### PCA Summary Table

```{python}
show_table(read_plain_csv("red_pca_summary.csv"), "Red wine PCA summary", indexed=False)
```

### PCA Eigenvalues

![Red wine PCA eigenvalues](../analysis/output/figures/red_pca_eigenvalues.png)

\newpage

## White Wine

### Summary Table

```{python}
show_summary_tables("white")
```

### Distribution Plots

![White wine distributions for all 11 variables](../analysis/output/figures/white_distributions.png)

### Pearson Correlation

![White wine Pearson correlation matrix](../analysis/output/figures/white_pearson_correlation.png)

### Spearman Correlation

![White wine Spearman correlation matrix](../analysis/output/figures/white_spearman_correlation.png)

### PCA Summary Table

```{python}
show_table(read_plain_csv("white_pca_summary.csv"), "White wine PCA summary", indexed=False)
```

### PCA Eigenvalues

![White wine PCA eigenvalues](../analysis/output/figures/white_pca_eigenvalues.png)

\newpage

## Combined

### Summary Table

```{python}
show_summary_tables("both")
```

### Distribution Plots

![Combined wine distributions for all 11 variables](../analysis/output/figures/both_distributions.png)

### Pearson Correlation

![Combined wine Pearson correlation matrix](../analysis/output/figures/both_pearson_correlation.png)

### Spearman Correlation

![Combined wine Spearman correlation matrix](../analysis/output/figures/both_spearman_correlation.png)

### PCA Summary Table

```{python}
show_table(read_plain_csv("both_pca_summary.csv"), "Combined wine PCA summary", indexed=False)
```

### PCA Eigenvalues

![Combined wine PCA eigenvalues](../analysis/output/figures/both_pca_eigenvalues.png)
